name: VerbalExpressions
comment:
Elm port of [VerbalExpressions](https://github.com/VerbalExpressions)
@docs verex, startOfLine, endOfLine, followedBy, find, possibly, anything, anythingBut, something, somethingBut, lineBreak, tab, word, anyOf, range, withAnyCase, repeatPrevious, repeatPrevious2, multiple, multiple2, orElse, beginCapture, endCapture, toRegex, toString, replace, VerbalExpression

aliases.name: VerbalExpression
aliases.comment: The main type used for constructing verbal expressions
aliases.type: { prefixes : String, source : String, suffixes : String, modifiers : { insensitive : Bool, multiline : Bool } }

values.name: anyOf
values.comment: Match a character class

values.name: anything
values.comment: Match any set of characters or not

values.name: anythingBut
values.comment: Match any set of characters except a particular String

values.name: beginCapture
values.comment: Start capturing a group

values.name: endCapture
values.comment: Finish capturing a group

values.name: endOfLine
values.comment: Restrict matches to end of line

values.name: find
values.comment: Start the expression with a matching group

values.name: followedBy
values.comment: Include a matching group in the expression

values.name: lineBreak
values.comment: Match a new line

values.name: multiple
values.comment: Match a group any number of times

values.name: multiple2
values.comment: Match a group a particular number of times

values.name: orElse
values.comment: Add an alternative expression

values.name: possibly
values.comment: Include an optional matching group

values.name: range
values.comment: Match a character class with ranges

values.name: repeatPrevious
values.comment: Repeat the prior case a number of times

values.name: repeatPrevious2
values.comment: Repeat the prior case within some range of times

values.name: replace
values.comment:
Chainable function for replacing a string with another string using a Regex
created using VerbalExpressions

values.name: something
values.comment: Match on one or more characters

values.name: somethingBut
values.comment: Match on one or more characters, with the execption of some String

values.name: startOfLine
values.comment: Restrict matches to start of line

values.name: tab
values.comment: Match a tab

values.name: toRegex
values.comment: Compile result down to a Regex.regex

values.name: toString
values.comment:
Compile result down to a String
Note, this is just a string of the expression. Modifier flags are discarded.

values.name: verex
values.comment: An initial, empty verex to start from and pipe through functions

values.name: withAnyCase
values.comment: Let the expression be case insensitive

values.name: word
values.comment: Match an alphanumeric word
